TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Byacing (riyax) hya' ga lpgan na riyax qaniy hya. lpgan na 'tayal sraral hya' ga, magal squ psbahan aring hmbku' byacing ruw mtbalay byacing ruw mucing sa mpuzyut lawziy qu sinxalan lmpuw na 'tayal.
S.PHON: ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč (rijax) ńßja Ē …£a lp…£an na rijax qanij ńßja. lp…£an na Ētajal s~…ēraral ńßja Ē …£a, ma…£al s~…ēqu ps~…ēő≤ańßan ariŇč ńßmő≤ku Ē ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ruw mtő≤alaj ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ruw mu ¶~ ®iŇč s~…ēa mpuzjut lawzij qu s~…ēinxalan lmpuw na Ētajal.
S.FORM: Byacing (riyax) hya' ga lpgan na riyax qaniy hya. lpgan na 'tayal sraral hya' ga, magal squ psbahan aring hmbku' byacing ruw mtbalay byacing ruw mucing sa mpuzyut lawziy qu sinxalan lmpuw na 'tayal.
S.PHON: ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč (rijax) ńßja Ē …£a lp…£an na rijax qanij ńßja. lp…£an na Ētajal s~…ēraral ńßja Ē …£a, ma…£al s~…ēqu ps~…ēő≤ańßan ariŇč ńßmő≤ku Ē ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ruw mtő≤alaj ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ruw mu ¶~ ®iŇč s~…ēa mpuzjut lawzij qu s~…ēinxalan lmpuw na Ētajal.
